name: Hot & Sour Soup 6
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Mushrooms, black, soaked in warm water
1/4 cup Wine, rice OR 1/4 cup Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine half of the light soy sauce, sesame oil, and cornstarch in a bowl. Marinate the pork slices with this mixture for 30 minutes.
2. In a large pot, bring chicken broth to a boil. Add the marinated pork and its marinade. Then add the soaked mushrooms, bamboo shoots, wine (or sherry), dark soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, remaining sesame oil, and hot pepper oil.
3. Cook the soup until the bean curd softens, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the beaten eggs. The soup is done when everything is heated through and the eggs are set.
5. Garnish with scallions before serving.
